svg.title: UnlockED Open Line marker system
svg.desc: A developer gallery of progress markers, interaction states, event glyphs, themes, and accessibility variants.
svg.text: Progress state lives in the marker. Event type lives beside the label.

g.text: Canonical progress states at production size

g.title: Journey origin
g.desc: The beginning of the student journey.

g.title: Explored opportunity
g.desc: An opportunity was viewed or saved for consideration.

g.title: Opportunity chosen
g.desc: An opportunity was deliberately added to the journey.

g.title: Application in progress
g.desc: Work on this opportunity has begun.

g.title: Application submitted
g.desc: A real application commitment was completed.

g.title: Interview or external response reached
g.desc: The student's work received meaningful outside validation.

g.title: Opportunity accepted
g.desc: The student received the opportunity.

g.title: Experience completed
g.desc: The opportunity became real experience or evidence.

g.title: Current recommended step
g.desc: The next recommended action on the open path.

g.title: Future possibility
g.desc: A plausible direction beyond the current step.

g.title: Direction paused
g.desc: This direction was intentionally paused.

g.title: Direction closed
g.desc: This direction ended and is no longer being pursued.

g.title: Directions rejoined
g.desc: Two parts of the path came back together.

g.title: Open path
g.desc: The journey remains open to what comes next.
